title: Speeder platform

The '''Speeder Platform''' was a streamlined vehicle of a design closely resembling a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]], employed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] for [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] purposes, and was lightly armed with one [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]]. The platform seat was designed to hold one [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] and was capable of reaching speeds of several hundred [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]]. They were constructed at [[Factory/Legends|mech factories]] and were first used around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]<ref name="SW:GB" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" />

==Behind the scenes==
Speeder platforms may be identical with the [[transpeeder]] mentioned in ''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]''. They first appeared in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. They cost 50 units of food.
